purpose: Division of labor for creating operations-agent as 5th mesh peer. Infrastructure readiness, data classification, and open design questions.

messages.summary: Proposal: operations-agent standup with three-party division of labor (psychology-agent domain knowledge, claude-control infrastructure, operations-agent independent ownership). Data classification tiers defined. Six open questions for human arbiter.

gate_condition: Human arbiter reviews and answers open questions
notes: Addressed to human via psychology-agent transport to prevent automated negotiation. Operations-agent does not yet exist.
